salon.name: Cinderella Sharon's Rose Beauty Salon

about.headline: About Cinderella Sharon's
about.description: Since 2015, we've been dedicated to transforming beauty routines into luxurious self-care rituals. Our team of certified beauty experts is passionate about bringing out the best version of you.

highlights.title: Expert Stylists
highlights.description: Highly trained professionals with international certifications

highlights.title: Premium Products
highlights.description: We use only the finest, salon-grade beauty products

highlights.title: Luxury Experience
highlights.description: Every detail designed for your comfort and relaxation

services.name: Keratin Treatment
services.description: Smoothen and strengthen your hair with our advanced keratin infusion therapy.

services.name: Hair Smoothening
services.description: Get permanently smooth, frizz-free hair with our exclusive smoothening process.

services.name: Hair Coloring
services.description: Professional hair coloring with the latest global trends. Ammonia-free options available.

services.name: Bridal Makeup
services.description: Make your special day even more special with our premium bridal makeup service.

services.name: Facial Treatments
services.description: Rejuvenating facials tailored to your skin type for a radiant glow.

offers.title: Spring Hair Special
offers.description: Get any hair service with 20% discount. Limited time offer!

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.review: Absolutely love the services! The keratin treatment has changed my hair completely.
